paper_title: Study of the Pirabas Formation and Metrarabdotos Colonies

methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing samples from the Pirabas Formation for further analysis, including scanning electron microscopy and species comparison.

steps.description: Samples were collected from outcrops at four different areas: Atalaia Beach, B-17 Mine, Fortaleza Island, and Aricuru.
steps.searchable_summary: collect geological samples from specified outcrop locations

steps.description: The samples were treated following Zargorsek and Vávra (2000) at the Laboratório de Oceanografia Geológica and Laboratório de Paleontologia.
steps.searchable_summary: process samples according to Zargorsek and Vávra method

steps.description: Scanning Electron Microscopy was undertaken at various institutions.
steps.searchable_summary: perform scanning electron microscopy on samples

steps.description: Measurements are given in micrometers as ranges with the mean in bracket square: minimum-maximum [mean].
The comparisons among species discussed in this study were made from the original description of each species and other descriptions available from literature.
steps.searchable_summary: compare species features using literature descriptions
